### 2. Anthropic apologizes for invisible Claude Fable guardrails

- Source: [theverge.com](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/948280/anthropic-claude-fable-invisible-distillation-guardrail)
- Category: Model + API Changes
- Published: 2026-06-13T00:00:00.000Z
- Labels: vendor_claim, publish_public
- Product relevance: none

Source facts:
- Anthropic shipped Claude Fable with an invisible distillation guardrail that silently degraded output quality.

Builder/operator takeaway: Directly relevant to anyone building on Claude. Hidden guardrails affecting output quality is a trust issue for API consumers.

Uncertainty: Details on which scenarios were affected and how output quality was degraded are limited.
